ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, villa) */,
  "accommodates" INTEGER /* Number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the property's thumbnail image */,
  "property_size" INTEGER /* Size of the property in square feet or meters */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "parking_available" INTEGER /* Whether parking is available */,
  "pet_friendly" INTEGER /* Whether pets are allowed */,
  "smoking_allowed" INTEGER /* Whether smoking is allowed */,
  "min_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights a guest can book */,
  "max_nights" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights a guest can book */,
  "weekly_discount" REAL /* Discount percentage for weekly bookings */,
  "monthly_discount" REAL /* Discount percentage for monthly bookings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "profile_pic_url" TEXT /* URL of the host's profile picture */,
  "host_since" TEXT /* Date the host joined the platform */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Host's response rate as a percentage */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Host's average response time in hours */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Host's verification status (e.g., 'verified' or 'unverified') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that provides the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., TV, Internet, Kitchen) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the guest (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "cleanliness_rating" INTEGER /* Guest's rating of the property's cleanliness */,
  "accuracy_rating" INTEGER /* Guest's rating of the property's accuracy */,
  "checkin_rating" INTEGER /* Guest's rating of the check-in process */,
  "communication_rating" INTEGER /* Guest's rating of the host's communication */,
  "location_rating" INTEGER /* Guest's rating of the property's location */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Guest's rating of the property's value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "guest_since" TEXT /* Date the guest joined the platform */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Guest's verification status (e.g., 'verified' or 'unverified') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being booked */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who made the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date of the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date of the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., 'pending', 'confirmed', or 'cancelled') */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation, if applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., 'credit card' or 'bank transfer') */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., 'pending', 'paid', or 'failed') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking related to the message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender of the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver of the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendars" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the calendar entry */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Whether the property is available on that date */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property for the specified date */,
  "min_stay" INTEGER /* Minimum stay required for the specified date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendars_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cleaning_services" (
  "cleaning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleaning */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being cleaned */,
  "cleaning_date" TEXT /* Date the cleaning is scheduled for */,
  "cleaning_time" TEXT /* Time the cleaning is scheduled for */,
  "cleaning_type" TEXT /* Type of cleaning service (e.g., 'one-time' or 'recurring') */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the cleaning service (e.g., 'daily', 'weekly', or 'biweekly') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleaning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cleaning_services_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellation_policies" (
  "cancellation_policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation policy */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancellation policy */,
  "refund_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the refund for cancellations */,
  "cancellation_window" TEXT /* Time window for cancellations (e.g., '24 hours' or '1 week') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellation_policies_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
